rootCause.description: nginx-proxy volumes contain hardcoded paths from a different test (notebox-account-title-visibility-is-ba-test), causing nginx to load incorrect configuration and return 502 Bad Gateway for all API requests

architect.summary: Traced data flow from demo button click to API call. Identified hardcoded paths in docker-compose.test.yml as root cause of 502 errors. nginx-proxy cannot reach backend due to incorrect configuration.

stack-expert.summary: Confirmed backend demo mode is correctly configured (DEMO_MODE_ENABLED=true). Identified nginx-proxy volumes pointing to wrong test paths. Also noted .env.production format change from VITE_API_URL="" to VITE_API_URL= (without quotes).

steps.description: Restore VITE_API_URL="" format with quotes instead of VITE_API_URL= (no quotes)
Remove docker-compose.test.yml from repository - it should be generated dynamically by the test system, not committed with hardcoded paths
Add docker-compose.test.yml to .gitignore to prevent future accidental commits

fixPlan.testingStrategy: 1. Verify nginx config loads correctly in test environment. 2. Test that /api/auth/demo returns 200. 3. Click 'Войти в демо' button and verify successful login without error message.
fixPlan.riskAssessment: Low risk for .env.production fix. Medium risk for removing docker-compose.test.yml - verify CI/CD doesn't depend on it being in repo.
